untranslatable_reason: This signal requires year-over-year relative performance ranking across a stock universe (comparing current month returns to same calendar month from 12 months prior), which cannot be expressed using only single-instrument technical indicators. The rule requires: (1) cross-sectional ranking of N stocks by historical returns, (2) memory of prior-year monthly performance, and (3) portfolio-level buy/short decisions based on relative rank. The allowed indicator set contains only price-based, momentum, and volatility metrics for individual bars/instruments. There is no mechanism to compute inter-temporal, cross-sectional relative performance or to store and compare 12-month lagged returns for ranking purposes.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a calendar-seasonal mean-reversion strategy that requires: (a) identifying the top N and bottom N performers in month M of year Y-1, (b) entering longs/shorts in month M of year Y based on that ranking. This requires a universe of stocks, 12-month lookback memory, and relative performance ranking—none of which are expressible in the allowed indicator vocabulary. The strategy is structural/portfolio-level, not technical-indicator-level. Recommend implementing as a separate portfolio construction module outside the backtest engine's rule condition system.
